text: When this resort was developed the thought was to put a chairlift into the middle of what was
just cat and heli accessible terrain. So it offered up the whole new experience to people
by saying here's what you can encounter in a cat or in a heli and by the way you could get
to it through the familiarity of a lift system. So cat skiing is you're using a motorized groomer
with a cabin on the back to take you to the top of a hill. The terrain you can get into can vary from
high alpine to long well-spaced gladed runs with waist deep snow.
What it offers you is a huge amount of vertical and then a quick easily accessed
sort of high elevation terrain. It's a great way to get into the high altitude terrain.
It's a great way to get into the high altitude terrain. It's a great way to get into the high altitude
format. You have that camaraderie and that team effort and that team experience built up around
you and you hear a lot of hooping and hollering in that cat. The thing about heli is that the access
to huge amounts of terrain and you're getting into phenomenal trees or high into the alpine.
Absolutely the ultimate experience. There's nothing like having an A-star come down pick you up
point out some peaks that you might want to go and land on them and then you do it all
over again.
You get into this terrain and you have all aspects of backcountry trees, skiing, steeps, pitches
and then all of a sudden right next to it phenomenal groomers that gives everybody
an opportunity to experience the resort. The vertical drop I think is one of the most noticed
characteristics of the hill. People come here and the runs just keep going and going and going.
One of the things that we offer is an experience of four days that encompasses everything. So you
get a little bit of snow school from there you get into a cat or a heli and then the reverse of that
cat or heli day and then you go backcountry touring after that. The nice part about this is the access
to all of these things being the revelation gondola. You know one point of entry to every
experience.
Laura
